description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical shampoo bottle with a metallic, weathered finish, giving it an industrial and slightly rugged appearance. The bottle features two horizontal copper-colored bands encircling its upper and lower sections, adding a touch of visual contrast. On the front, there is a peach illustration accompanied by stylized text, suggesting a peach-scented or peach-themed product. The surface appears to have a matte, slightly rough texture, with visible scuffs and wear marks that enhance its urban, utilitarian vibe. The cap is flush with the top and appears to be a simple, flat closure, possibly a screw cap. The overall design is minimalistic, with the main decorative elements being the bands and the central peach motif.
description: A tall, cylindrical metallic shampoo bottle with copper bands and a peach-themed label, featuring a weathered, industrial finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the peach illustration, product name, and copper bands clearly.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the cylindrical shape and copper bands, with label details mostly obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view displays faint text and label details, with the copper bands still visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the cylindrical form and bands, with only a partial glimpse of the front label.
attribute_brand_logo: A peach illustration with stylized text reading 'Peach Tea'.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: tall and cylindrical with flat top and bottom
attribute_packaging_graphics: Peach fruit illustration and two horizontal copper bands
